channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Iran Claims Fired Missiles On 2 US Warships, CENTCOM Says "Did Not"

media:content.media:description: The US military's Central Command was quick to deny that the incident had taken place.

item.description: It is the latest episode to shake a ceasefire announced on April 8 that has largely halted hostilities between Iran and the United States.
item.content:encoded: It is the latest episode to shake a ceasefire announced on April 8 that has largely halted hostilities between Iran and the United States.

item.title: Unseen Photos Surface 37 Years After China's Tiananmen Square Protests

media:content.media:description: The photographs were taken by a Chinese state media photographer.

item.description: Thousands of people are estimated to have been killed on June 4, 37 years ago.
item.content:encoded: Thousands of people are estimated to have been killed on June 4, 37 years ago.

item.title: Video: Russia Amusement Park Names Ride After Nuke-Ready Missile 'Oreshnik'

media:content.media:description: The "Oreshnik" ride, named after a nuclear-capable hypersonic missile, at an amusement park in Russia.

item.description: The Oreshnik, which Russia first fired against Ukraine in 2024, and most recently last month, has a range of over 5,000 km (3,100 miles).
item.content:encoded: The Oreshnik, which Russia first fired against Ukraine in 2024, and most recently last month, has a range of over 5,000 km (3,100 miles).

item.title: 'Extremely Intelligent' Bear Attacks 4, Escapes Factory Through Locked Window In Japan

media:content.media:description: Fukushima City officials said the bear had been hit with a tranquilliser dart.

item.description: Authorities in Fukushima continue searching for a bear that injured four people before escaping an electronics factory by opening a locked window.
item.content:encoded: Authorities in Fukushima continue searching for a bear that injured four people before escaping an electronics factory by opening a locked window.

item.title: Watch: US Forces Board Oil Tanker Carrying Iranian Crude In Indian Ocean

media:content.media:description: US forces boarded an oil tanker in the Indian Ocean overnight.

item.description: The Davina was sanctioned in 2024 by the US Treasury, which said it had delivered oil from Iran to China.
item.content:encoded: The Davina was sanctioned in 2024 by the US Treasury, which said it had delivered oil from Iran to China.

item.title: Astronauts On International Space Station In Evacuation Mode As Russians Fix Air Leak

media:content.media:description: Four astronauts of NASA's Crew-12 mission on the station.

item.description: The air leaks have been relatively minor in recent months but escalated on Monday from a pound of air per day to two pounds.
item.content:encoded: The air leaks have been relatively minor in recent months but escalated on Monday from a pound of air per day to two pounds.

item.title: Israel Secretly Sent "Elite" Troops To Azerbaijan For Ops In Iran War: Report

media:content.media:description: The forces were initially planned to be rescue teams, but then they expanded operations

item.description: The quiet deployment in Azerbaijan is only one of the few military positions in the Middle East that gave Israel unprecedented access to Iran. The posting only shows how big of a role the neighbouring countries played to assist in operations against Tehran.
item.content:encoded: The quiet deployment in Azerbaijan is only one of the few military positions in the Middle East that gave Israel unprecedented access to Iran. The posting only shows how big of a role the neighbouring countries played to assist in operations against Tehran.

item.title: How Ukraine's Satellite Intelligence Move Is Saving Money, Time, Lives

media:content.media:description: The visuals has reduced the time to locate and strike Russian assets by almost 90 per cent.

item.description: The advantages of using this technology and imagery provided by Colorado-based Vantor extend beyond the precision of Ukraine's attacks.
item.content:encoded: The advantages of using this technology and imagery provided by Colorado-based Vantor extend beyond the precision of Ukraine's attacks.

item.title: "War Will End Only When It Ends In Lebanon": Iran's Araghchi Amid US Talks

media:content.media:description: Israel has kept up strikes in southern Lebanon.

item.description: Iran has made a ceasefire between Israel and Hezbollah a condition for any peace deal with the US to resolve the war, and restart shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: Iran has made a ceasefire between Israel and Hezbollah a condition for any peace deal with the US to resolve the war, and restart shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Ex-Prince Andrew Sublet Royal Cottages For "Peppercorn Rent": UK Auditors

media:content.media:description: Andrew pocketed proceeds from subletting three cottages on its large grounds.

item.description: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor lived until recently in the Royal Lodge on the royal family's Windsor estate near London.
item.content:encoded: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor lived until recently in the Royal Lodge on the royal family's Windsor estate near London.

item.title: Video: 'Mushroom Cloud' Over Mexico As Tanker Carrying Stolen Fuel Explodes

media:content.media:description: The tanker was allegedly transporting smuggled gasoline at the time of the explosion.

item.description: Videos circulating on social media showed the moment the tanker went up in flames near Tepeaca, a small city roughly 35 kilometres east of Puebla.
item.content:encoded: Videos circulating on social media showed the moment the tanker went up in flames near Tepeaca, a small city roughly 35 kilometres east of Puebla.

item.title: Xi Jinping To Meet Kim Jong Un: Why It Matters And What To Expect

media:content.media:description: Xi's visit will be his first foreign trip this year.

item.description: China's President Xi Jinping will visit North Korea on Monday as he seeks to cement Beijing's influence in its own backyard.
item.content:encoded: China's President Xi Jinping will visit North Korea on Monday as he seeks to cement Beijing's influence in its own backyard.

item.title: Trump Sees Win As US Senate Approves $70 Billion For Immigration Crackdown

media:content.media:description: The package follows a record partial shutdown of the Department of Homeland Security.

item.description: The bill would fund ICE and Border Patrol through the rest of Trump's term, handing the Republican leader a major victory on one of his signature issues.
item.content:encoded: The bill would fund ICE and Border Patrol through the rest of Trump's term, handing the Republican leader a major victory on one of his signature issues.

item.title: US Realtor And Her Daughters Killed By Ex-Husband In Suspected Murder-Suicide

media:content.media:description: Doral Mayor Christi Fraga expressed grief over the incident.

item.description: The outlet also reported that Hyer and Whiten were no longer together but had been co-parenting their daughters before their deaths.
item.content:encoded: The outlet also reported that Hyer and Whiten were no longer together but had been co-parenting their daughters before their deaths.

item.title: India, Norway Seal Green Partnership, Maritime Deals in PM Modi's Oslo Visit

media:content.media:description: Norway's Ambassador to India called the visit "very successful"

item.description: In an exclusive interview to NDTV, Norway's Ambassador to India, May-Elin Stener, called the visit "very successful" and pointed to a sweep of concrete outcomes that she said would define the partnership for years to come.
item.content:encoded: In an exclusive interview to NDTV, Norway's Ambassador to India, May-Elin Stener, called the visit "very successful" and pointed to a sweep of concrete outcomes that she said would define the partnership for years to come.

item.title: ChatGPT Is 'Dreaming' To Cure Its Digital Amnesia

media:content.media:description: The new feature will roll out to all Free tier users over the coming weeks

item.description: OpenAI's new background architecture stops the chatbot from forgetting your life-and it's coming to the free tier.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI's new background architecture stops the chatbot from forgetting your life-and it's coming to the free tier.

item.title: Putin Offers Su-57 Fighter To Delhi As India Searches Its 5th-Gen Jet

media:content.media:description: India's hesitation is rooted in both operational and strategic calculations

item.description: The Su-57, developed by Russia's Sukhoi Design Bureau, is designed to carry out a wide range of combat missions, including engagement of air, ground and maritime targets.
item.content:encoded: The Su-57, developed by Russia's Sukhoi Design Bureau, is designed to carry out a wide range of combat missions, including engagement of air, ground and maritime targets.

item.title: US-Iran Live Updates: "Would Be Honoured To Meet": Trump On Iran's Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei

media:content.media:description: US-Iran War Live: The US said that it had "successfully defeated" a series of Iranian missile attacks.

item.description: US-Iran War Live: Iran fired missiles at Kuwait and Bahrain hours after US conducted strikes on Iran's Qeshm Island amid ongoing peace talks between Washington and Tehran.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War Live: Iran fired missiles at Kuwait and Bahrain hours after US conducted strikes on Iran's Qeshm Island amid ongoing peace talks between Washington and Tehran.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | Panic In Silicon Valley: Why 15,000 Indians Fled US Last Year - With More On Their Way
item.description: More than 15,000 Indian tech professionals returned home from the US in 2025, and 7,300 have already returned this year, driven by layoffs, visa denials, and a job market that's fast becoming a nightmare.
item.content:encoded: More than 15,000 Indian tech professionals returned home from the US in 2025, and 7,300 have already returned this year, driven by layoffs, visa denials, and a job market that's fast becoming a nightmare.

item.title: How H-1B Curbs Are Affecting The Texas Real Estate Market

media:content.media:description: A wave of H-1B restrictions is pushing Indian buyers out of housing market

item.description: A wave of H-1B restrictions and AI-related tech layoffs is pushing Indian buyers out of the housing market.
item.content:encoded: A wave of H-1B restrictions and AI-related tech layoffs is pushing Indian buyers out of the housing market.
